sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_ulid (id UInt32, ulid String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
SELECT id, ULIDStringToDateTime(ulid) AS event_time FROM test_ulid;
UPDATE test_ulid SET ulid = '01GNB2S2FGN2P93QPXDNB4EN2R' WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, ULIDStringToDateTime(ulid, 'UTC') AS event_time_utc FROM test_ulid;
